goal: affine_span_contains[V, P](a, src, x) = forall(x0: AffineSubspace[V, P]) { x0.space = a and forall(x1: P) { src(x1) implies x0.contains(x1) } implies x0.contains(x) }
proof: function[T0: AddCommGroup, T1](x0: AffineSpace[T0, T1], x1: T1 -> Bool, x2: T1) { forall(x3: AffineSubspace[T0, T1]) { x3.space != x0 or exists(k0: T1) { x1(k0) and not k0 ∈ x3 } or x2 ∈ x3 } = affine_span_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[V, P](a, src, x)
(forall(x0: AffineSubspace[V, P]) { x0.space != a or exists(k0: P) { src(k0) and not k0 ∈ x0 } or x ∈ x0 } = true)
function(x0: AffineSubspace[V, P]) { not (x0.space = a and forall(x1: P) { not src(x1) or x1 ∈ x0 } and not x ∈ x0) }(t)
function(x0: AffineSubspace[V, P]) { not (x0.space = a and forall(x1: P) { not src(x1) or x1 ∈ x0 }) or x ∈ x0 }(t)

function[T0, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: AffineSubspace[T1, T0], x1: AffineSubspace[T1, T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = affine_subspace_subset[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[P, V](affine_span[V, P](a, src), t)
t.space = a
(forall(x0: P) { not src(x0) or x0 ∈ t } = true)
not forall(x1: P) { not x1 ∈ affine_span[V, P](a, src) or x1 ∈ t }
(forall(x2: P) { not x2 ∈ affine_span[V, P](a, src) or x2 ∈ t } = true)
